overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through an industrial waterfront district at dusk. The player moves from a riverside promenade past a large billboard and bridge, along a palm-lined industrial road with power pylons, and stops at an intersection with a factory in the background.

events.description: passing close to the billboard structure temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk next to a multi-lane road

entered.detail: large red billboard with 'Los Santos' text and vehicle advertisement
large steel railway bridge spanning across the water
tall lattice steel electricity pylon with multiple cables
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk
weathered concrete barrier separating sidewalk from water canal
industrial waterway running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an industrial waterfront at dusk, with a prominent red billboard advertising Los Santos visible ahead. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a retaining wall and water canal on the right, with palm trees and massive power pylons lining the left side. A large steel truss bridge spans the water in the distance as the player moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with high voltage power lines

events.description: moving from waterfront promenade into open industrial area with dirt ground
slight turn to the right while approaching the industrial factory complex

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial road passing between power pylons and palm trees

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving along the road in the same direction

entered.detail: large factory building with multiple cylindrical silos and smokestacks
large cylindrical concrete barriers near the road
yellow diamond-shaped traffic sign indicating right turn

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open industrial corridor with dirt ground underfoot. The billboard and waterfront exit view as the camera passes massive high-voltage pylons that now dominate the center of the frame. An industrial factory with silos becomes visible on the left, while palm trees line the path. The steel bridge recedes into the distance on the right.

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light, vehicles visible crossing
stopping at the crosswalk to wait for traffic to clear

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and stopping at the red light to observe passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the red traffic light
red sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: traffic light showing red signal for pedestrians
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
wooden telephone poles with overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an industrial intersection, transitioning from dirt to asphalt. The traffic light shows red as the player stops at the crosswalk. Several vehicles including a black SUV and red sedan move through the intersection. The industrial factory with silos now dominates the left side of the frame at close range, while power lines and utility poles frame the urban industrial landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through an industrial waterfront district at dusk that gradually shifts from a riverside promenade to a busy urban intersection. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a water canal, moving past a prominent red Los Santos billboard and toward a distant steel truss bridge while palm trees and massive power pylons line the path. As the camera advances, the waterfront recedes and the terrain transitions to an open industrial corridor of dirt ground, where high-voltage pylons dominate the view and a factory with silos emerges on the left. The scene then shifts from dirt to asphalt as the camera approaches a crosswalk, finally coming to a stop at a red traffic light. At this intersection, the industrial factory looms large in the frame while a black SUV and red sedan pass through the urban landscape under a network of utility poles.
